## Schema.treeEntries() method

Iterates over the schema tree entries, useful for recursive operations on the schema tree

**Signature:**

```typescript
treeEntries(callbackfn: (value: [string, BaseSchema], index: number, array: [string, BaseSchema][]) => void): void;
```
